executor-api/package.json.summary: Package configuration for a Node.js executor API that provides lint and syntax checking with Express and ESLint.

executor-api/server.js.summary: Express server with token-based authentication that exposes POST endpoints for syntax checking and linting JavaScript files using ESLint.

index.html.summary: Frontend HTML page for a self-recursive bot with dark/light theme toggle, code highlighting via highlight.js, and responsive design.

keywords.json.summary: A JSON file providing pre-defined keywords and one-sentence summaries for multiple Netlify edge function proxy files.

netlify.toml.summary: Netlify configuration file defining build command, edge function routes for various proxies, and CORS headers for allowed origins.

netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: This edge function proxies POST requests to the DeepSeek chat completions API, supporting streaming responses and handling errors.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: This edge function proxies POST requests to a Railway backend, deriving the endpoint suffix from the request URL and using an auth token.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: This edge function proxies POST requests to the Firecrawl search API, processing results into a structured format with domain extraction.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: This edge function exposes a GitHub Personal Access Token from environment variables via a GET request, with CORS headers.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: This edge function proxies POST requests to the LangSearch web search API, forwarding the request body and handling errors.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: This Netlify Edge Function proxies POST requests to the OpenRouter API, supporting streaming responses and error handling, with authorization via an environment variable.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: During Netlify deploy previews, this script injects JavaScript into index.html to hide the login gate and display the main app.

preferences.json.summary: A JSON configuration for a self-improving bot with editable settings for clarification prompts, planning rules, execution style, and review strictness.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: A React component implementing a simple chat interface with configurable settings, message management, error logging, and integration with workspace and provider stores.

src/components/SimpleChat/ChatPane.js.summary: A React component that renders chat messages with adaptive styling for mobile, compact mode, and light/dark themes.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: The Header component renders the chat interface header with a sidebar toggle button, bot title, and active repository display, adapting styles based on theme and window width.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: InputBar provides a text input field and send button for user messages with adaptive layout and styling based on theme, compact mode, and device width.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageContent.summary: MessageContent renders user and agent messages with support for code blocks and thinking sections, adjusting text size and color based on theme and user role.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: MessageList displays chat messages in a scrollable container with role-specific styling and alignment, including automatic scroll to bottom.

src/components/SimpleChat/RunCard.js.summary: RunCard shows the execution state of a run with phase indicator, log output, and expandable compact view, adapting colors to theme and phase.

src/components/SimpleChat/Sidebar.js.summary: A React sidebar component that toggles theme and shows settings panel based on mobile detection.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: React component that renders a scrollable list of tasks with status indicators, adapting height for mobile.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: A simple toast notification component that displays a fixed message with color-coded border.

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: Core class that orchestrates a self-improvement loop using GitHub, LLM, task queue, and planning modules.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: Accumulates file summaries and observations to build compact context strings for LLM prompts.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: Builds a keyword index for large repositories by processing files in groups of 5, extracting keywords and summaries, and committing the resulting keywords.json using GitHub and LLM services.

src/core/execution/agenticExecutor.js.summary: Executes a single task using a read-before-write loop, delegating prompt building, edit application, quality checks, and commit verification to focused modules.

src/core/execution/commitVerifier.js.summary: Re-reads a committed file to verify its SHA matches the expected SHA after commit.

src/core/execution/promptBuilder.js.summary: Builds the LLM prompt for the agentic executor using ContextBuilder for smart file selection and injecting conversation memory.

src/core/execution/qualityGate.js.summary: Runs lint/syntax checks before commit and retries up to 2 times with LLM-generated fixes.

src/core/execution/searchReplaceHandler..summary: Applies SEARCH/REPLACE edit blocks to file contents, builds a fileMap for commit, retries on match failure, and strips comments for JS/CSS files.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: Discovers and scores up to 8 relevant files based on a goal using either a pre-built keyword index or fallback filename matching, loading file contents for scoring.

src/core/goalVerifier.js.summary: Checks if the feature branch diff achieves the original goal by asking an LLM for a verdict, returning achieved or not achieved with a reason.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: Indexes slash commands and provides fuzzy matching to find the best command based on user input, using Levenshtein distance and prefix matching.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: Loads or builds a manifest.json file from the repository, either from existing file or by scanning JS files and building from source.

src/core/manifestUpdater.js.summary: Incrementally updates manifest.json by re-parsing exports and imports of changed files using static regex and recomputes importedBy relationships.

src/core/orchestration/clarificationQueu.summary: Implements a state-machine for asking clarification questions, saving them to conversation memory and returning a promise that resolves when the user sends answers.

src/core/orchestration/cycleExecutor.js.summary: Runs up to 3 cycles of execution and review for self-improvement tasks, using persistent memory and parallel execution.

src/core/orchestration/pauseController.j.summary: Provides a simple pause flag manager with request, check, and reset functions.

src/core/orchestration/postRunActions.js.summary: Runs post-run actions after review passes, including manifest update, regression detection, and PR creation.

src/core/orchestration/runSetup.js.summary: runSetup initializes cross-run conversation memory, ingests error contexts from the goal, loads user preferences, and creates a feature branch on GitHub before the planning phase.

src/core/parallelExec.js.summary: executeAllParallel runs pending tasks from the task queue concurrently up to a maximum concurrency, skipping tasks whose files are locked by other running tasks.

src/core/persistentMemory.js.summary: persistentMemory serializes and deserializes WorkingMemory objects to/from JSON files in the .self-improve directory, scoped by a runId to avoid overwrites during nested or concurrent runs.

src/core/planner.js.summary: plan uses an LLM to generate a structured plan with milestone and tasks based on discovered relevant files or the file tree, then initializes the task queue with the returned tasks.

src/core/planning/agenticPlanner.js.summary: agenticPlanner iteratively reads candidate files by instructing an LLM to decide whether to read a file or finish, building working memory and then initializing the task queue.

src/core/planning/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: Multi-agent plan creation that groups candidate files by top-level directory, launches parallel exploration agents per directory (max 5 files each), then merges summaries into a single plan using a coordinator agent.

src/core/planning/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: Extends existing planners by decomposing a complex goal into sub-goals via an architect deciding whether to decompose and then breaking the goal into 2-5 sub-goals with dependencies.

src/core/planning/plannerFactory.js.summary: Factory that picks the right planner based on discovery cache size: uses coordinated plan if cache > 10 files, otherwise agentic plan, then wraps with hierarchical planning.

src/core/prCreator.js.summary: Creates a pull request on GitHub with a title prefixed by 'Self‑improve:' and the goal string truncated to 60 characters, returning the PR URL.

src/core/regressionDetector.js.summary: Detects regressions by finding files that import changed files and checking whether the symbols they expect still exist, using LLM to analyze potential missing symbols.

src/core/reviewer.js.summary: Provides code review functionality comparing original and committed files to enforce goal alignment and report line-level issues.

src/core/taskQueue.js.summary: Manages a task queue with status transitions (TODO, DONE, FAILED) and provides functions for task retrieval and status updates.

src/core/taskQueueUtils.js.summary: Provides topological sorting of tasks based on their dependency graph to ensure correct execution order.

src/main.js.summary: Main entry point that initializes services and creates a SelfImprover instance for code improvement tasks using React and various stores.

src/services/PreferencesService.js.summary: Loads and saves preferences.json from a GitHub repository, providing default configuration for clarification, planning, execution, and review settings.

src/services/conversationMemory.js.summary: Manages cross-run memory backbone by storing structured context per repo and branch in localStorage, with methods to start a run, record decisions, failed attempts, and update phase.

src/services/errorIngestion.js.summary: Parses error stack traces to extract file paths and line numbers, converting them into planner-friendly context strings for injection.

src/services/executorApi.js.summary: Handles communication with a Netlify edge proxy to run lint and syntax checks, with fail-open behavior on network errors to avoid blocking commits.

src/services/github.js.summary: Provides methods to fetch a repository's file tree, load file content using base64 decoding, and commit multiple files to a branch via the GitHub API.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: Provides a single point to call language models through Netlify edge proxies, supporting timeout, retries, model override, and DeepSeek thinking mode.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: SmokeTest class polls a Netlify deploy-preview URL until the page renders correctly or times out.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: Zustand store with persistence for managing AI provider selection, model, thinking mode, and reasoning effort.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: Zustand store with persistence for workspace context including repository, branch, and GitHub token.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: Parses AI replies to extract update_editor, SEARCH/REPLACE, and read_file actions.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: ContextBuilder selects target and related files from a manifest to build a prompt context respecting a token budget.

src/utils/manifestBuilder.js.summary: Builds a dependency graph for JavaScript files by extracting and resolving ES module imports and exports, then computing reverse dependencies.

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: Executes code in a sandboxed iframe with preloaded service modules, evaluates it, and performs a health check with a timeout.

src/utils/searchReplace.js.summary: Applies SEARCH/REPLACE blocks to file content using exact and whitespace-flexible matching, returning errors for unmatched blocks.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: Removes JavaScript and CSS comments and blank lines to reduce prompt size.
